findings.summary: R17+R6 (both 2 mOhm) misidentified as voltage divider; they are series current-shunt resistors
findings.details: The analyzer reports R17(2mOhm) as r_top and R6(2mOhm) as r_bottom forming a voltage divider. In fact, R17 and R6 are both CRE2512 2 mOhm current-sense shunts placed in series. Milliohm-range resistors cannot serve as a voltage divider.

findings.summary: Opamp-based current sensing via LM258 (U7) and DCDC_SHUNT+/LOAD_SHUNT+ nets not detected
findings.details: The LC design uses three units of a dual LM258 opamp (U7) as differential amplifiers to amplify signals from shunt resistors. The current_sense detector finds zero entries.

findings.summary: DFM board size violation correctly flagged for LC board (114.5x60.5 mm exceeds 100x100 mm threshold)
findings.details: The analyzer correctly reports a DFM 'board_size' violation for the board (114.5x60.5 mm), noting it exceeds the 100x100 mm standard tier threshold.
